title: carlina curetum
intro: Carlina curetum, also known as Carline Thistle, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Carlina curetum are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carlina curetum include reducing pain and swelling, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
